name: Lamb Chops Bandit Style - Arni Palikari
recipeIngredient: 125 g Kasseri or Gruyere cheese, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 220°C.
2. Lightly grill lamb until browned on each side but not cooked through.
3. Place each chop on a square of foil.
4. In a frying pan, melt butter and fry onion and garlic gently until onion is soft.
5. Spoon the onion mixture onto the meat, leaving butter in the pan.
6. Add 2 slices of potato on top of each chop and brush with the remaining butter.
7. Top with tomato slices and sprinkle lightly with oregano or rigani.
8. Place a slice of cheese on top and fold foil to seal completely.
9. Arrange packages close together, with cheese on top.
10. Bake in smoker or oven for 2-3 hours.
11. Serve directly onto plates, accompanied by a tossed green salad.
